leak_analysis.fix: Defend more vs c-bets with draws
Bet more for value, add river bluffs

period_comparison._description: Cash sessions split at 2025-07-15. "good" = before cutoff, "bad" = on/after.

session_management.detail: After losing >€50, take a break before next session.
Late hours often correlate with losing streaks.

session_management.action: Don't move up stakes during downswings
session_management.detail: Stay at your level when running bad.

summary._payment_note: Token entries cost €0 real money but had ticket face value. real_money_pnl_eur is the true out-of-pocket P&L.
